issues.title: [Superseded] Viewer controls are deferred beyond the wiki MVP
issues.outcome: Close the viewer-control implementation issue because the public wiki MVP intentionally hides runtime features.
scope: Retain historical context and link to the post-MVP runtime epic.
acceptanceCriteria: Issue is closed as not planned for MVP and points to the post-MVP epic.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Superseded] Viewer embedding is replaced by wiki-first song detail pages
issues.outcome: Close the viewer-embedding issue and use the wiki song/pack detail issue for the MVP.
scope: Retain historical context and link to song-pack-pages and post-MVP runtime epic.
acceptanceCriteria: Issue is closed as not planned and replacement links are visible.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.
